name: Satchidananda Ashram - Yogaville
description: Satchidananda Ashram, known as Yogaville, is a spiritual community and yoga retreat center in Buckingham, Virginia, founded by Sri Swami Satchidananda. Its centerpiece is the Light of Truth Universal Shrine (LOTUS), an interfaith shrine dedicated to the light of all world religions. The ashram offers yoga teacher training, retreats, and residential programs in Integral Yoga.
